title: catevala scabra
intro: Catevala scabra, also known as the Catevala scabra plant or Tree Peony, is a type of flowering plant native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Catevala scabra include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Catevala scabra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make tea, capsules, or topical creams for various health benefits.
